title: Zhandou Wang: Jufeng Zhan Hun V

synonyms: Zhandou Wang: Jufeng Zhan Hun 5th Season
战斗王之飓风战魂 第五季

synopsis:
It tells the story of Ye Xingyun, a genius spinning top player on the Battle Soul Continent, a land once brimming with "elemental energy," a bounty bestowed upon humanity by nature. To investigate his origins, he travels to the mysterious Hurricane Academy, where he teams up with his new friends Gu Yan, Yi Wenxuan, and Lin Xiaoxi to participate in the annual Hurricane Spinning Top Championship. There, he inadvertently discovers a major secret not only related to Ye Xingyun's past but also involving the disappearance of the world's strongest energy element. Ye Xingyun and his friends diligently learn spinning top combat techniques at the academy, forging deep friendships through numerous matches, and embarking on an adventure to the Illusionary Realm with their companions.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
